basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 33 Senior Resident, Junior Resident Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: The Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) has officially announced the Senior Resident (Hospital Services) and Junior Resident (Non-academic) Recruitment 2026 with 33 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 45 years and hold the required medical qualifications (MS/DNB, MD/MS/DNB, MBBS with internship, or relevant specialized degrees) can now attend the walk-in interview on 29 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and check application details are shared bel

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation to a maximum of 5 years may be given to SC/ST/OBC candidates having domicile of Uttar Pradesh, and to widowed / divorced / legally separated women who have not re-married, and to disabled/handicapped persons, as per Government rules for Senior Resident posts only.

qualification.education_qualification: MS/DNB (General Surgery), MD/MS/DNB (Obstetrics & Gynaecology), M.D/ DNB. (P.M.R) /M.D.(Medicine) with Diploma in PMR/M.S. (General Surgery) /M.S.(Orthopaedics), MBBS inclusive 01-year internship, Forensic Medicine, Trauma Surgery / General Surgery, Oral and maxillofacial surgery
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Hospital Services) - Cardiovascular and Thoracic Surgery (CVTS): MS/DNB (General Surgery) Senior Resident (Hospital Services) - Pediatric Surgical Super specialties: MS/DNB (General Surgery) Senior Resident (Hospital Services) - Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation (PMR): M.D/ DNB. (P.M.R) /M.D.(Medicine) with Diploma in PMR/M.S. (General Surgery) /M.S.(Orthopaedics) Senior Resident (Hospital Services) - Maternal & Reproductive Health: MD/MS/DNB (Obstetrics & Gynaecology) Junior Resident (Non-academic) - Emergency Medicine: MBBS inclusive 01-year internship Junior Resident (Non-academic) - Hepatology including Transplant: MBBS inclusive 01-year internship Senior Resident (Hospital Services) / Junior Resident (Non-academic) - Forensic Medicine: Forensic Medicine Senior Resident (Hospital Services) / Junior Resident (Non-academic) - Trauma Surgery: Trauma Surgery / General Surgery Senior Resident (Hospital Services) - Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery (Under Apex Trauma Centre): Oral and maxillofacial surgery

salary_details.senior resident (hospital services) / ju: Level 11 i.e. Rs.67700-208700 or Level 10 i.e. Rs.56100/-
Level 11 i.e. Rs.67700-208700 or Level 10 i.e. Rs.56100/-

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by SGPGIMS?
faq.answer: SGPGIMS has released a total of 33 vacancies for the posts of Senior Resident (Hospital Services) and Junior Resident (Non-academic).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the SGPGIMS recruitment will be held on 29 May 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident and Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 45 years, with age relaxation applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, including degrees like MS/DNB (General Surgery), MD/MS/DNB (Obstetrics & Gynaecology), and MBBS with internship.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 56100/- to Rs. 67700/- per month, depending on the post and level.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the SGPGIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to attend the walk-in interview with all required original documents and self-attested copies.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for SGPGIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 200/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the SGPGIMS office in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation of up to 5 years is provided for SC/ST/OBC candidates from Uttar Pradesh, widowed/divorced women, and disabled persons.
